title: Looker Studio Asset
description: Represents a Looker Studio asset such as a report or data source. Assets are the primary resources managed through the Looker Studio API and can be searched, shared, and have their permissions managed programmatically.

assetType.description: The type of the Looker Studio asset.

name.description: The unique name (ID) of the asset. This serves as the primary identifier when referencing the asset in API calls.

title.description: The display title of the asset as shown in the Looker Studio interface.

description.description: Description of the asset. Only supported for REPORT asset type.

owner.description: The email address of the asset owner.

creator.description: The email address of the user who originally created the asset.

createTime.description: Timestamp when the asset was created, in RFC 3339 format.

updateTime.description: Timestamp when the asset was last modified by any user, in RFC 3339 format.

updateByMeTime.description: Timestamp when the asset was last modified by the user making the API call, in RFC 3339 format.

lastViewByMeTime.description: Timestamp when the asset was last viewed by the user making the API call, in RFC 3339 format.

trashed.description: Indicates whether the asset is currently in the trash.
